title: ornithogalum umbellatum var. divergens
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum var. divergens is a variety of the Star of Bethlehem plant, characterized by its white, bell-shaped flowers and long, thin leaves. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Ornithogalum umbellatum var. divergens are believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
